decision: Build exactly one smallest justified report-only experiment: add pre-fight feature-availability/completeness indicators. Do not force a market-prior feature from the market-disagreement clusters in this epic.

candidate_signals.name: pre_fight_feature_availability_flags

feature_semantics.meaning: Count of NaN values in the existing point-in-time feature vector before model training.
Share of NaN values in the existing point-in-time feature vector before model training.
1 when wins_last_3_diff and wins_last_5_diff are both present before the fight, else 0.
1 when weight_class_change and same_weight_class_count_diff are both present before the fight, else 0.

candidate_signals.data_source: Existing pre-fight feature vector returned by ml.features.build_features/build_feature_row. No new scrape source is required.

leakage_review.reason: The indicators are derived only from whether existing point-in-time inputs are present before the target fight. They do not inspect fight result, post-fight stats, or future events.

candidate_signals.expected_direction: Missingness should reduce overconfident model picks or let the report-only model learn that sparse/recent-form-missing rows are less reliable than fully observed rows.
minimum_report_only_validation: Rerun the same market residual bucket report on the augmented feature set.
Compare model_70_plus, feature_availability:sparse, and heavy_favorite_75_plus buckets against Task C baseline.
Require no degradation in overall log loss/Brier and at least one actionable cluster moving toward market performance before recommending broader model-family work.

candidate_signals.name: market_disagreement_context
candidate_signals.data_source: No-vig FightOdds market probabilities plus model probabilities.

leakage_review.reason: Market probabilities are pre-fight/current-at-import, but D2-MIX already tested market blends and market-aware model-family candidates. Rebuilding this signal would duplicate existing market-prior experiments.

candidate_signals.expected_direction: Would mostly teach the model to defer to market favorites when model and market disagree.
candidate_signals.no_build_reason: The evidence is market-prior dominance, not a missing internal pre-fight signal. Keep this as diagnostic context and do not spend Task E on it.

task_e_recommendation.scope: report-only feature experiment; no active model_versions writes
